data.description: MannKind shares latest updates on FUROSCIX® business, including sales numbers and expansion plans.

data.title: Foresight partners with Zeda Korea in South Korea for its 3D perception systems, a strategic cooperation agreement.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Foresight Autonomous Holdings Ltd. revealed a significant collaboration with Zeda Korea Ltd. The agreement, involving Foresight's advanced 3D perception systems, is set to unfold across multiple phases. Foresight, renowned for its innovative technologies, is listed on both Nasdaq and TASE under the ticker symbol FRSX. Zeda Korea, a prominent South Korean company specializing in road safety and infrastructure maintenance vehicles, will leverage Foresight's expertise in this partnership. This strategic cooperation underlines a major step for both companies in the realm of cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Totaligent (OTCID:TGNT) concludes 2025 with full marketing platform launch after successful QA testing across all channels. CEO shares holiday message.
data.description: Totaligent (OTCID:TGNT) has achieved a significant milestone by successfully finishing QA testing on its complete marketing and campaign platform. This marks a crucial step forward for the company in ensuring the quality and reliability of its services.

data.title: SiriusPoint expands IMG services post Assist America acquisition; strengthening global insurance benefits.
data.description: Bermuda-based company SiriusPoint Ltd. (NYSE: SPNT), a global specialty insurer and reinsurer, revealed on December 23, 2025, their acquisition plans. The company, along with its subsidiary International Medical Group (IMG), a prominent provider of global insurance benefits and assistance services, will acquire Assist America. This move solidifies SiriusPoint's position in the industry and expands its portfolio.

data.title: Qolab ends 2025 with strategic partnerships, milestones in quantum hardware, aiming for a commercially useful quantum computer.
data.description: In 2025, Qolab, headquartered in Madison, Wisconsin, concluded the year with significant achievements in strategic partnerships, product implementations, and industry recognition, highlighting the increasing support for its scalable superconducting quantum technology. These developments signal important steps towards the company's goal of constructing a practical quantum computer through advanced semiconductor-based manufacturing and holistic system integration. Over the year, Qolab strengthened its partnerships and solidified its position as a leader in the field.

data.title: Enveda receives US FDA clearance for IND application of ENV-6946, starting Phase 1 trial for oral treatment of IBD.
data.description: Enveda, a biotech company based in Boulder, Colorado, has recently received clearance from the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for their Investigational New Drug application for ENV-6946. This marks a significant step for the company as they have now initiated a Phase 1 clinical trial for ENV-6946. This oral small molecule drug is a first-in-class treatment aimed at addressing inflammation. Enveda is pioneering the development of small-molecule drugs derived from life’s chemistry, and this clearance from the FDA is a crucial milestone in their journey. The Phase 1 clinical trial will be a key stage in advancing ENV-6946 towards potential approval, showcasing Enveda's commitment to innovation in the biotech industry.

data.title: Volato Group (NYSE: SOAR) expects $27-28 million revenue in Q4 2025 and $78-79 million for the full year. Strategic growth noted.
data.description: Atlanta-based Volato Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SOAR) has released preliminary financial guidance for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025. The company projects revenue between $27 million and $28 million for the fourth quarter of 2025, showcasing progress towards strategic and balance sheet goals. The anticipated revenue for the full year 2025 is expected to range from $78 million to $79 million. This reflects Volato's commitment to meeting its objectives and driving growth in the upcoming year.

data.title: Sharon AI to sell 50% of Texas Critical Data Centers LLC for US$70 million to joint venture partner New Era Energy & Digital Inc.
data.description: SharonAI Holdings Inc. and its subsidiaries have entered into a binding agreement to sell their 50% stake in Texas Critical Data Centers LLC (TCDC) for US$70 million. TCDC, a joint venture with New Era Energy & Digital Inc., will see Sharon AI's portion acquired by their partner. SharonAI is a prominent Neocloud company in Australia, traded as SHAZ:OTC Markets and SHAZW:OTC Markets.

data.title: VOKA offers free 1-month access to VOKA 3D Anatomy & Pathology for new users, a high-precision atlas for medical professionals.
data.description: A company based in St. Petersburg, Florida, VOKA, is offering a promotion where individuals can receive one month of free access to their VOKA 3D Anatomy & Pathology tool. This tool is a detailed 3D atlas designed for medical education and for professionals working in clinical settings. This offer allows users to utilize the high-precision 3D anatomy resources provided by VOKA for free for a limited period.

Avery and Carey Miller, renowned forensic accounting and litigation consulting experts, were commended by global consulting firm J.S. Held for their exceptional leadership, innovation, and service. data.title: WSSA supports $700 million regenerative ag project; technical support crucial for success.
data.description: The success of the $700 million Regenerative Pilot Project, announced by the U.S. Secretary in December 2025 in Westminster, Colo., greatly relies on technical support derived from weed science research. The Weed Science Society of America (WSSA) representatives are actively involved in providing crucial support for the project to ensure its effectiveness and sustainability.

data.title: High Tide Inc. recaps key milestones of 2025, a cannabis retail company with symbols on Nasdaq, TSXV, and FSE.
data.description: Calgary, Alberta on December 23, 2025 - High Tide Inc., known as High Tide, a company listed on Nasdaq with the symbol HITI, on TSXV as HITI, and on FSE as 2LYA, is a retail enterprise focusing on cannabis value. They recently celebrated significant achievements and milestones.

data.title: DVISION optimization engine enhances aluminum lightweight manufacturing for North American automakers, boosting lead-time stability and material efficiency.
data.description: DVISION has enhanced lead-time stability and material efficiency to meet the growing demand from North American automakers for consistent lightweight production systems. This shift in focus highlights the importance of reliable and efficient manufacturing processes to meet industry demands. In Detroit on December 23, 2025, the company highlighted their success in achieving this goal. With North American automakers increasingly seeking predictable lightweight production systems, DVISION's improvements are timely. The automotive industry is evolving, and the company's ability to provide stable lead times and enhance material efficiency is crucial. These developments signify a shift towards more optimized and streamlined production processes, reflecting the changing landscape of the automotive sector.

data.title: Indovinya offers smart solutions for biopesticides in agriculture, meeting demand for sustainable crop protection.
data.description: Indovinya has introduced new solutions to tackle the challenges associated with the use of biologically based products in response to the increasing demand for sustainable crop protection. The company, based in THE WOODLANDS, Texas, unveiled the innovations on Dec. 23, 2025. Biopesticides have been increasingly favored over traditional methods, with a rising demand for sustainable approaches in agriculture.

data.title: Intero Digital ranked 6th on 2025 Clutch 1000 list of global B2B service providers, showcasing success and industry standing.
data.description: In Colorado Springs on December 23, 2025, Intero Digital, a digital marketing agency acclaimed for its data-focused strategies and top-tier knowledge, proudly revealed its placement as the 6th company on the respected 2025 Clutch 1000 list. This recognition highlights the company's exceptional performance and industry standing.

data.title: Newton Golf's shafts were named No. 1 for drivers & fairway woods by Club Champion in 2025, showing strong demand.
data.description: In CAMARILLO, California, Newton Golf Company (NASDAQ: NWTG) revealed that its shafts dominated sales at Club Champion in 2025. The Company's shafts secured the top spot for both drivers and fairway woods at the renowned club fitting retailer, showcasing high demand among golfers working with professional fitters. This achievement highlights Newton's increasing prominence in the realm of performance golf equipment.

data.title: Barnes & Noble Education reports a $1.6B revenue in FY2025, with net loss of $65.8M and total net debt of $94M. Adjusted EBITDA was $59.4M. 223 campus stores implemented First Day Complete for Fall 2025 with 1.14M enrollment up 24%. Reiterates Outlook for FY2026 with expected Adjusted EBITDA of $65-75M. Total debt decreased to $103.1M from $196.3M last year. Plans to grow Adjusted EBITDA by 15-20% in FY2027. Company aims to drive growth & operational excellence.
data.description: Barnes & Noble Education, Inc. released its fiscal 2025 results, reporting revenue of $1.6 billion, a $43 million increase from the prior year. Gross Comparable Store Sales increased by $117.2 million, and revenues from BNC First Day programs rose by $119.9 million, a 25.3% increase. The company's net loss from continuing operations was $65.8 million, and Adjusted EBITDA for fiscal 2025 was $59.4 million, a $22.7 million increase from the prior year. Total net debt decreased to $94 million, a $92 million reduction year-over-year. First Day Complete enrollment saw a 24% increase to approximately 1.14 million undergraduate and graduate students, with a significant improvement in the net working capital position. Looking ahead to fiscal 2026, the company expects top-line growth and Adjusted EBITDA in the range of $65 to $75 million. The company also anticipates improving gross margins and aims to grow Adjusted EBITDA by 15% to 20% or more in fiscal 2027. Barnes & Noble Education operates as a leading solutions provider in the education industry and continues to focus on operational excellence to drive growth.

data.title: Safe Pro Group Inc. has launched SPAI Ventures to invest in defense tech, with focus on collaborations with international developers. Nasdaq: SPAI.
data.description: Safe Pro Group Inc. (SPAI) recently created SPAI Ventures LLC, a subsidiary aimed at exploring strategic investments and partnerships with Ukrainian and global tech firms. SPAI, listed on Nasdaq as SPAI, focuses on AI-driven defense and security solutions. The move indicates a proactive effort to expand its portfolio and global reach. The subsidiary will target collaborations in tech innovation. This initiative signals SPAI's commitment to growth and indicates a shift towards international partnerships. Ukrainian entrepreneurs may benefit from this opportunity.
